{{define "tag_filters"}} {{if .Tags}} {{ $query := urlquery .Query }}
    {{range .Tags}} {{ $tag := urlquery . }} {{ $activeHref := "/search" }} {{ $inactiveHref := printf "/search?tag=%s" $tag }} {{if $.Query}} {{ $activeHref = printf "/search?q=%s" $query }} {{ $inactiveHref = printf "/search?q=%s&tag=%s" $query $tag }} {{end}}
  • {{if eq $.Tag .}} {{.}} {{else}} {{.}} {{end}}
    • {{end}}
{{end}} {{end}}
